# ARIS Upstream Notice

This project vendors a curated subset of skills and helper tools from
`wanshuiyin/Auto-claude-code-research-in-sleep`.

The vendored subset is included to provide the research engine for
CodexResearchDesk. The top-level decision workflow is new and lives in the
Desk Layer skills:

- `research-desk`
- `decision-memo`
- `preflight-gate`
- `aris-runner`

When updating vendored ARIS content, preserve the upstream MIT license and
record major changes in this file or in release notes.
